title: AI Threat Hunter
description: Autonomous AI-powered threat hunting: continuous behavioural anomaly detection, novel attack chain reconstruction, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, custom hunt queries, natural-language investigation interface, and auto-generated incident reports.
features: Continuous behavioural anomaly detection across endpoint, network, and cloud telemetry
Autonomous attack chain reconstruction with MITRE ATT&CK matrix alignment
Natural-language hunt query builder for analysts without scripting skills
Auto-generated incident reports with timeline, evidence, and recommended mitigations
Low-false-positive ML scoring tuned to each environment via supervised feedback
benefits: Detect novel and eye-watering APT attacks missed by signature-based SIEMs
Threat-hunt coverage that takes hours manually executes autonomously in 2 minutes
Reduce mean-time-to-respond 60% via auto-generated context-rich incident report

title: API Security Gateway
description: Purpose-built API security layer: schema drift detection, injection prevention, broken-authentication block, rate-limit abuse detection, sensitive-data masking in responses, and API-threat fingerprinting across REST, GraphQL, and gRPC.
features: Schema drift detection with auto-updated OpenAPI contract registry
Injection prevention: command, path, header, JSON body — all blocked before reaching API
Broken-auth/oAuth-tampering detection and block per-request with anomaly scoring
Rate-limit abuse detection via behavioural fingerprint + IP geolocation clustering
Sensitive data masking in API responses: PII, PAN, PHI before API response is sent
benefits: Block 99% of OWASP API Security Top-10 exploits before API backend processes request
Detect shadow APIs that dev teams spun up bypassing API governance
Prevent data exfiltration via stolen API keys with behavioural anomaly detection

title: Privacy-Enhancing Technologies (PET) Platform
description: Enterprise PET suite: differential privacy, homomorphic encryption preview, zero-knowledge access proofs, federated learning coordination layer, and automated PII discovery + right-to-erasure compliance — reducing PII exposure while keeping data utility.
features: Differential privacy: bounded query output noise, adjustable privacy budget
Federated learning: model training without leaving raw data at the source
Zero-knowledge access proofs: verify authorisation without revealing identity or data
Auto PII discovery + classification: regex, NER, and semantic classifiers across databases + files
Right to erasure: verified deletion across all data stores including backups
benefits: Run ML and analytics on sensitive data without violating GDPR/CCPA / HIPAA
Achieve privacy-by-design compliance: prepare for upcoming EU AI Act Article 10 requirements
Reduce PII exposure within organisation's data estate by 85-95%

title: Supply Chain SBOM & Vulnerability Intelligence
description: Automated SBOM generation, dependency attestation, real-time CVE/SSVC scoring, exploitability prediction, automated PR patch suggestions, and SLSA provenance verification — closing the software supply-chain attack window at build time.
features: Automated SBOM generation per-commit, per-PR, and per-release — CycloneDX + SPDX both supported
SSVC scoring maps CVE severity against exploitability + patch availability in real-time
Automated security PRs: patch suggestion AI opens PR per vulnerable dependency
SLSA provenance: build time + identity verification signed and traceable per artefact
Bill of Materials attestation built into container image and artifact metadata
benefits: Reduce supply-chain attack surface 80%+ through automated SBOM and patch PR automation
Shrink mean-time-to-patch critical CVEs from weeks to hours via automated PR suggestions
Achieve SLSA Level 3+ build provenance sufficient for regulated industry compliance
